title: Early years education recovery programme: evaluations
body: "These reports evaluate the impact of projects in the Department for Education’s early years education recovery programme.  The programme was a support package for the early years sector.  It aimed to address the impact of the pandemic on England’s youngest and most disadvantaged children.  We are still evaluating the impact of some projects in the programme, and its overall impact.  There is information about the programme in the National Archives. "
